title: Velvety Reduction German Mushroom Flatbread
description: A nostalgic vegan twist on Rahmschwammerl, featuring a peppery balsamic reduction and silken cream sauce atop toasted naan.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 400°F (200°C) and place the naan breads on a baking sheet.
In a small saucepan, simmer the balsamic vinegar over low heat until it reduces by half into a thick glaze.
Melt the vegan butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and shallots, sautéing for 8-10 minutes until deep golden brown.
Stir in the cracked black pepper and fresh thyme, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Lower the heat and pour in the oat cream, stirring constantly until the sauce coats the mushrooms in a velvety layer.
Lightly toast the naan in the oven for 3 minutes until slightly crisp.
Spread the mushroom mixture evenly over the toasted naan.
Drizzle the warm balsamic reduction over the mushrooms in a zigzag pattern.
Slice into wedges and serve immediately while warm.
